items.title: BAYRYs Cardiovascular Drug Hits Goals in Late-Stage Study
items.description: Bayer's asundexian hits key goals in the OCEANIC-STROKE study, showing reduced ischemic stroke risk without added major bleeding.

items.title: Hip Replacement Market Competitive Landscape Report 2025: Recent Developments, Strategies, Sustainability, Product Launches, Key Persons, and Revenue Forecasts
items.description: The Hip Replacement industry is poised for substantial growth, projected to reach US$ 10.24 billion by 2033, up from US$ 6.92 billion in 2024, at a CAGR of 4.45% between 2025 and 2033. This expansion is driven by increased awareness of procedures such as hip arthroplasty, which helps alleviate discomfort and enhance mobility for those with severe joint disorders.
